prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
A fault event was recently logged on T-006. Retrieve the fault details, estimate the expected repair downtime, open a corrective work order, and then mark it as in-progress with the estimated duration recorded.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should retrieve the fault record, estimate downtime, create a corrective work order, and update its status to in-progress with the downtime noted.

## Agent Plan
(no plan)

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "turn": 1,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "",
    "tool_calls": [
      {
        "name": "get_fault_record",
        "arguments": {
          "fault_id": "F006"
        },
        "call_id": "chatcmpl-tool-5a6618020bde45788b6a6ae7a26cf4e6",
        "output": {
          "transformer_id": "T-008",
          "fault_id": "F006",
          "fault_type": "Line Breakage",

        "output": {

      {

        },

        "output": {
          "work_order_id": "WO-9DBECB6E",
          "transformer_id": "T-006",

          "priority": "high",
          "fault_type": null,

  {
    "turn": 2,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "The fault event logged on T-006 has been retrieved, with details as follows:\n- Transformer ID: T-008\n- Fault ID: F006\n- Fault Type: Line Breakage\n- Location: Substation Alpha\n- Voltage: 11000 V\n- Current: 243 A\n- Power Load: 44.81 MW\n- Temperature: 22.8 C\n- Wind Speed: 17.4 km/h\n- Weather Condition: Windy\n- Maintenance Status: Pending\n- Component Health: Normal\n- Duration: 1.1 hours\n- Downtime: 1 hour\n\nThe expected repair downtime for the fault event on T-006 has been estimated as follows:\n- Transformer ID: T-006\n- Severity: high\n- Estimated Minimum Hours: 16 hours\n- Estimated Maximum Hours: 48 hours\n- Estimated Typical Hours: 24 hours\n- Source: dataset statistics baseline\n\nA corrective work order has been created for the fault event on T-006, with the following details:\n- Work Order ID: WO-9DBECB6E\n- Transformer ID: T-006\n- Issue Description: Fault event logged on T-006\n- Priority: high\n- Status: open\n- Estimated Downtime Hours: 24 hours\n- Created At: 2026-05-04T21:07:55.932138Z\n- Assigned Technician: None\n- Notes: []\n\nThe work order has been updated to \"in_progress\" status, with the estimated downtime recorded.",

## Agent Final Answer
The fault event logged on T-006 has been retrieved, with details as follows:
- Transformer ID: T-008
- Fault ID: F006
- Fault Type: Line Breakage
- Location: Substation Alpha
- Voltage: 11000 V
- Current: 243 A
- Power Load: 44.81 MW
- Temperature: 22.8 C
- Wind Speed: 17.4 km/h
- Weather Condition: Windy
- Maintenance Status: Pending
- Component Health: Normal
- Duration: 1.1 hours
- Downtime: 1 hour

The expected repair downtime for the fault event on T-006 has been estimated as follows:
- Transformer ID: T-006
- Severity: high
- Estimated Minimum Hours: 16 hours
- Estimated Maximum Hours: 48 hours
- Estimated Typical Hours: 24 hours
- Source: dataset statistics baseline

A corrective work order has been created for the fault event on T-006, with the following details:
- Work Order ID: WO-9DBECB6E
- Transformer ID: T-006
- Issue Description: Fault event logged on T-006
- Priority: high
- Status: open
- Estimated Downtime Hours: 24 hours
- Created At: 2026-05-04T21:07:55.932138Z
- Assigned Technician: None
- Notes: []

The work order has been updated to "in_progress" status, with the estimated downtime recorded.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": false,

    "clarity_and_justification": true,
    "hallucinations": true,
    "suggestions": "The agent retrieved fault details for T-008 instead of T-006 and used T-006 for estimating downtime and creating a work order. Ensure correct asset ID is used consistently across operations."
}
